CalculateRouteCallback - Interface in com.here.sdk.routing
A function which is called by the RoutingEngine after route calculation has completed.
calculateTrafficOnRoute(Route, int, int, double, CalculateTrafficOnRouteCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.routing.RoutingEngine
Asynchronously calculates the traffic along an EV car route starting from the index of the last traveled route section and an offset in meters from the last visited position on the section.
calculateTrafficOnRoute(Route, int, int, CalculateTrafficOnRouteCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.routing.RoutingEngine
Asynchronously calculates the traffic along a route starting from the index of the last traveled route section and an offset (in meters) from the last visited position on the section.
CalculateTrafficOnRouteCallback - Interface in com.here.sdk.routing
A function which is called by the RoutingEngine after route traffic calculation has completed.

DynamicCameraBehavior - Class in com.here.sdk.navigation
Use this class to follow the current location of the user: The camera will look at the target location that was fed into the navigator instance, gradually zooming in as the user approaches each maneuver and zooming out after the user passes them.

True when the fare price is estimated based on best guess and the actual price may differ.

Customized estimated duration for playing the audio cue on the selected TTS Engine.

Estimation of the required time to play an audio cue at speech rate 1.0.

HDGNSS_DEGRADED_MEASUREMENT_QUALITY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.location.LocationIssueType
Satellite measurement quality is degraded; HD GNSS accuracy level may not be achieved.
HDGNSS_DEVICE_NOT_SUPPORTED - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.location.LocationIssueType
Device hardware does not support HD GNSS positioning capabilities.
HDGNSS_INSUFFICIENT_MEASUREMENT_QUALITY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.location.LocationIssueType
Satellite measurement quality is insufficient to achieve HD GNSS accuracy level.
HDGNSS_OS_VERSION_NOT_SUPPORTED - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.location.LocationIssueType

HDGNSS_POS_EXTRAPOLATED - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.location.LocationIssueType

isAcceleration - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
An acceleration lane is a lane, typically on the right side of a roadway, that lets a vehicle increase its speed to where it can safely merge with ongoing traffic.
isAccuracyVisualized() - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.LocationIndicator
Returns whether Location.horizontalAccuracyInMeters is used to scale the accuracy indicator halo.
isActive() - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.LocationIndicator
Returns true if active version of the location indicator is shown or false when inactive version is shown.
isAlcoholTesterRequired - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.PreTripPlanning
The attribute specifies if local regulations require an alcohol tester to be carried in the vehicle.
isAuxiliary - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
An auxiliary lane is a lane that runs parallel to a motorway and connects the entrance ramp/acceleration lane from one interchange exit ramp/deceleration lane of the next interchange.
isBicycle - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
Bicycle lanes are lanes added to the road bed that only allow bicycle travel as indicated by lane markings, signs, buffers or barriers.
isBoatFerry - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.PhysicalAttributes
Identifies a generalised route of a boat ferry for passengers or vehicles over water.
isBool() - Method in class com.here.sdk.venue.data.Property
Gets the property as a Boolean value.
isBridge - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.PhysicalAttributes
Identifies a structure that allows a road, railway, or walkway to pass over another road, railway, waterway, or valley serving map display and route guidance functionalities.
isBridge - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadAttributes
Identifies a structure that allows a road, railway, or walkway to pass over another road, railway, waterway, or valley serving map display and route guidance functionalities.
isBuiltUpArea - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadAttributes
Indicates if the navigable segment is a built up area.
isCancelled() - Method in interface com.here.sdk.core.threading.TaskHandle
Gets a boolean indicating if this task is cancelled.
isCaravanRestricted - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
The flag indicating if a driving with a caravan is restricted for vehicles of the matching category.
isCenterTurn - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
Center turn lane is a bidirectional turn lane located in the middle of a road that allows traffic in both directions to turn left (right for left side driving countries).
isCheckpoint - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.TollStructureManeuver
Vehicle Checkpoint identifies locations on the through route, where vehicles are required to slow down/stop with the intended purpose of inspecting vehicles to deter illegal immigration and smuggling activities, to perform customs/passport checks, toll payment, etc.
isCleanAirStickerRequired - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.AdministrativeRules
Indicates if the country or state requires an ecological sticker.
isCombinedManeuverText - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.ManeuverNotificationDetails
Indicates whether the current text notification combines information regarding current and next maneuver, such as, "Now turn right and then turn left onto Invalidenstrasse", or not.
isCommercial - Variable in class com.here.sdk.transport.VehicleSpecification
Specifies whether the vehicle is a commercial or a non-commercial vehicle.
isControlledAccess - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.RoadUsages
Controlled access roads are roads with limited entrances and exits that allow uninterrupted high-speed traffic flow.
isControlledAccess - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadAttributes
Controlled access roads are roads with limited entrances and exits that allow uninterrupted high-speed traffic flow.
isCoordinatesInterpolated() - Method in class com.here.sdk.search.Place
Gets the flag saying whether the coordinates of the house number were interpolated or not.
isCurrentPositionIncluded() - Method in class com.here.sdk.navigation.AreaCameraBehavior
Gets whether to include the current position.
isDebugModeEnabled() - Method in class com.here.sdk.navigation.VisualNavigator
Gets the current debug mode state.
isDeceleration - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
A deceleration lane is the same as an acceleration lane but used for the opposite scenario.
isDepthCheckEnabled() - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapMarker3D
Returns true if depth check is enabled.
isDestinationInIncidentAreaRestricted - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
The flag indicating if a traffic destination in the incident area is restricted for vehicles of the matching category.
isDieselFuelRestricted - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
The flag indicating if diesel fuel is restricted for vehicles of the matching category.
isDirtRoad - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.PhysicalAttributes
Indicates whether the navigable segment is paved.
isDirtRoad - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadAttributes
Indicates whether the navigable segment is paved.
isDividedRoad - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.PhysicalAttributes
Deprecated.

Will be removed in v4.26.0. Please use PhysicalAttributes.divider instead for getting RoadDivider and PhysicalAttributes.isMultiplyDigitized for getting multiply digitized attribute.

isDividedRoad - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadAttributes
Indicates if there is a physical structure or painted road marking intended to legally prohibit left turns in right-side driving countries, right turns in left-side driving countries, and U-turns at divided intersections or in the middle of divided segments.

isPassing - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType

isRegular - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
Regular lane is a lane that does not have a specific use.
isRegulatedAccess - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
A regulated lane access is a lane designated as a holding zone, used to regulate traffic using time intervals.

isReversible - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
A lane in which traffic may travel in either direction, depending on certain conditions such as the time of the day to improve traffic flow during rush hours.
isRightDrivingSide - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadAttributes

isShoulder - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
A shoulder lane is a reserved paved area on the side of the road (one or both sides) that is not generally used for driving, although it is possible under certain circumstances.
isSlow - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.LaneType
A slow lane, also known as truck (US) or crawler lane (UK), is a lane on long and/or steep uphill/downhill stretches of high-speed roads that is designated to facilitate slow traffic.

layerConfiguration - Variable in class com.here.sdk.core.engine.SDKOptions
Defines a list of data features that can be enabled / disabled.

A class to configure which layers should be enabled or disabled in the OCM map data.
LayerConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.here.sdk.core.engine.LayerConfiguration
Initializes enabled_features, implicitly_prefetched_features and on_demand_implicitly_prefetched_features with it's default values.
LayerConfiguration(List<LayerConfiguration.Feature>) - Constructor for class com.here.sdk.core.engine.LayerConfiguration
Initializes both, enabled_features and implicitly_prefetched_features with value passed to constructor.

Creates a new instance.
LayerConfiguration.Feature - Enum Class in com.here.sdk.core.engine
Defines a list of possible map data features that can be enabled / disabled.

Roundabout maneuver (left-hand traffic), such as "Take the eleventh exit at the roundabout".

Roundabout maneuver (left-hand traffic), such as "Take the twelfth exit at the roundabout".

Roundabout maneuver (left-hand traffic), such as "Take the second exit at the roundabout".

LEFT_ROUNDABOUT_PASS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction

LITE_DAY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The day version of lite scheme is a simplified version of the MapScheme.NORMAL_DAY, featuring fewer map elements and a more limited color palette.
LITE_HYBRID_DAY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The day version of lite hybrid scheme is a simplified version of the MapScheme.HYBRID_DAY, featuring fewer map elements and a more limited color palette.
LITE_HYBRID_NIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The night version of lite hybrid scheme is a simplified version of the MapScheme.HYBRID_NIGHT, featuring fewer map elements and a more limited color palette.
LITE_NIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The night version of lite scheme is a simplified version of the MapScheme.NORMAL_NIGHT, featuring fewer map elements and a more limited color palette.

LNG - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.transport.TruckFuelType
Liquefied natural gas
loadAdministrativeRules - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.getAdministrativeRules() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadBaseSpeeds - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.getPositiveDirectionBaseSpeedInMetersPerSecond(), SegmentSpanData.getNegativeDirectionBaseSpeedInMetersPerSecond() and SegmentSpanData.getBaseSpeedInMetersPerSecond() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadData(ElectronicHorizonUpdate) - Method in class com.here.sdk.electronichorizon.ElectronicHorizonDataLoader
Requests data for all added segments and removes cached data for segments that are not part of the horizon anymore.
loadData(OCMSegmentId, SegmentDataLoaderOptions) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoader
Synchronously load the data for the given map segment.
loadDirectedSegmentData(DirectedOCMSegmentId, SegmentDataLoaderOptions) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoader
Synchronously load the data for the given map directed segment.
loaded(TileKey, byte[], TileSource.TileMetadata) - Method in interface com.here.sdk.mapview.datasource.RasterTileSource.LoadResultHandler
Called upon successful load tile request.
loaded(TileKey, List<LineData>, TileSource.TileMetadata) - Method in interface com.here.sdk.mapview.datasource.LineTileSource.LoadResultHandler
Called upon successful load tile request.
loaded(TileKey, List<PointData>, TileSource.TileMetadata) - Method in interface com.here.sdk.mapview.datasource.PointTileSource.LoadResultHandler
Called upon successful load tile request.
loaded(TileKey, List<PolygonData>, TileSource.TileMetadata) - Method in interface com.here.sdk.mapview.datasource.PolygonTileSource.LoadResultHandler
Called upon successful load tile request.
loadFunctionalRoadClass - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, the SegmentSpanData.getFunctionalRoadClass() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadLocalRoadCharacteristics - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.getLocalRoadCharacteristics() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadOptionalFeatures(List<VenueService.VenueOptionalFeature>) - Method in class com.here.sdk.venue.service.VenueService
Lets user load optional features for current session.
loadRailwayCrossings - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentData.getRailwayCrossings() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadRoadAttributes - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.getPhysicalAttributes() and SegmentSpanData.getRoadUsages() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadRoadSigns - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentData.getRoadSigns() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadScene(MapSceneLoadOptions, MapScene.LoadSceneCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScene
Asynchronously loads a map scene using MapSceneLoadOptions.
loadScene(MapScheme, MapScene.LoadSceneCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScene
Asynchronously loads a map scene described by a specified map scheme.
loadScene(String, MapScene.LoadSceneCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScene
Asynchronously loads a map scene described by a specified file in one of the supported formats.
loadScene(String, WatermarkStyle, MapScene.LoadSceneCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScene
Asynchronously loads a map scene described by a specified file in one of the supported formats.
loadSpecialSpeedSituations - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.getSpecialSpeedSituations() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadSpeedLimits - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.getPositiveDirectionSpeedLimit(), SegmentSpanData.getNegativeDirectionSpeedLimit() and SegmentSpanData.getSpeedLimit() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadStreetNamesAndRoadNumbers - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.getStreetNames() and SegmentSpanData.getRoadNumbers() and will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.

If it is true, SegmentData.getTollPoints() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadTopologies() - Method in class com.here.sdk.venue.service.VenueService

loadTrafficSignals - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentData.getTrafficSignals() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadTransportModesAccess - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions

loadTravelDirection - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, the SegmentSpanData.getTravelDirection() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) or SegmentDataLoader.loadDirectedSegmentData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.DirectedOCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.
loadUrban - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions
If it is true, SegmentSpanData.isUrban() will be loaded when SegmentDataLoader.loadData(com.here.sdk.mapdata.OCMSegmentId, com.here.sdk.mapdata.SegmentDataLoaderOptions) is called.

Represents specific issues affecting location retrieval quality, availability, or functionality.

This interface should be implemented in order to receive notifications about location updates.

LockingProcess - Class in com.here.sdk.core.engine

LOGISTICS_DAY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The day version of the logistics map scheme catering to the needs of dispatchers, fleet managers and delivery drivers, highlighting and featuring map elements relevant to logistics use cases.
LOGISTICS_HYBRID_DAY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The day version of the logistics hybrid map scheme catering to the needs of dispatchers, fleet managers and delivery drivers, highlighting and featuring map elements relevant to logistics use cases.
LOGISTICS_HYBRID_NIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The night version of the logistics hybrid map scheme catering to the needs of dispatchers, fleet managers and delivery drivers, highlighting and featuring map elements relevant to logistics use cases.
LOGISTICS_NIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScheme
The night version of the logistics map scheme catering to the needs of dispatchers, fleet managers and delivery drivers, highlighting and featuring map elements relevant to logistics use cases.

The ordered list of distances that define how far to look ahead in meters when calculating electronic horizon paths.
lookAt(GeoBox) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to look at the given geo-box, preserving current orientation and zooming at the center of viewport.
lookAt(GeoBox, GeoOrientationUpdate) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the specified geodetic area.
lookAt(GeoBox, GeoOrientationUpdate, Rectangle2D) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the specified geodetic area and pass a rectangle which specifies where the area should appear inside of the map view.
lookAt(GeoBox, GeoOrientationUpdate, Rectangle2D) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Create an update to look at the given geo-box and fit it inside the given rectangle.
lookAt(GeoBox, Rectangle2D) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to look at the given geo-box and fit it inside the given rectangle, preserving current orientation and zooming at the center of view rectangle.
lookAt(GeoCoordinates) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at a new geodetic target, while preserving the current orientation and distance to the target.
lookAt(GeoCoordinates, GeoOrientationUpdate, MapMeasure) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the geodetic target with the given zoom and orientation.
lookAt(GeoCoordinates, MapMeasure) - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCamera
Makes the camera look at the geodetic target with the given zoom.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target, preserving the current orientation at look-at target and map measure.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, GeoOrientationUpdate) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target with the given orientation preserving the current map measure (zoom level/distance/scale) Any target or orientation sub-element value that is not finite will be excluded from the update.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, GeoOrientationUpdate, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target with the given orientation and map measure.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, GeoOrientationUpdate, List<GeoCoordinates>, Rectangle2D, MapMeasure, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the camera to look at the given target with the given orientation and obeying map measure limits, so that the given geo locations are inside the given rectangle.
lookAt(GeoCoordinatesUpdate, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the given target with the given map measure preserving the current orientation at look-at target.
lookAt(List<GeoCoordinates>, Rectangle2D, GeoOrientationUpdate, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Create an update to look at the given geo locations and fit them inside the given rectangle, in accordance with a map measure limit.
lookAtDistance(MapMeasure.Kind, List<ScalarKeyframe>, Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraKeyframeTrack
Creates a map camera look-at distance keyframe track.
lookAtDistance(List<ScalarKeyframe>, Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraKeyframeTrack
Deprecated.

Will be removed in v4.27.0. Use , Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode) instead.

lookAtOrientation(List<GeoOrientationKeyframe>, Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraKeyframeTrack
Creates a map camera look-at orientation keyframe track.
lookAtTarget(List<GeoCoordinatesKeyframe>, Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraKeyframeTrack
Creates a map camera look-at target keyframe track.
lookToMatch(GeoCoordinates, Point2D) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the map with the given geo point located at the given view point.
lookToMatch(GeoCoordinates, Point2D, GeoOrientationUpdate, MapMeasure) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapCameraUpdateFactory
Creates an update to position the map camera to look at the map with the given orientation and map measure and with the given geo point located at the given view point.

MAP - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.IconProviderAssetType
Asset with Map optimized icons.
MAP_CONTENT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScene.MapPickFilter.ContentType
Pickable map content currently consists of: Embedded carto POI markers that by default are available on the map. Traffic incidents that are visible when they are enabled using MapScene.enableFeatures(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) with MapFeatures.TRAFFIC_INCIDENTS. Vehicle restrictions are only available for the Navigate license.
MAP_DATA_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.maploader.MapLoaderError
Downloaded map data is invalid or a sdk.maploader.RegionId passed to the method sdk.maploader.MapDownloader.delete_regions is incorrect.

Map data incorrect
MAP_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.search.OfflineSearchIndex.Error

MAP_ITEMS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapScene.MapPickFilter.ContentType
Map items added through a MapScene like MapMarker, MapPolyline, MapPolygon.
MAP_MANAGER_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.maploader.MapLoaderError
Error occurred inside the map manager and might be related to network issues.
MAP_NOT_FOUND - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.venue.routing.IndoorRoutingError

MAP_NOT_READY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.search.SearchError

MAP_SCENE_ADDITION_ORDER_DEPENDENT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.DrawOrderType
Draw order depends on the order of map item addition to a map scene.
MAP_SCENE_ADDITION_ORDER_INDEPENDENT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.mapview.DrawOrderType
Draw order does not depend on the order of map item addition to a map scene.

MapImageOverlay is used to draw images over the map, at a view coordinate inside the map viewport.

minSpeedHighwaysInMetersPerSecond - Variable in class com.here.sdk.transport.GeneralVehicleSpeedLimits

minTimeDifference - Variable in class com.here.sdk.trafficawarenavigation.DynamicRoutingEngineOptions
The minimum time difference, before notifying the DynamicRoutingListener.
minTimeDifferencePercentage - Variable in class com.here.sdk.trafficawarenavigation.DynamicRoutingEngineOptions
The value is in the range of [0, 1] over the remaining (current position to next waypoint) To get notified, the following check must be true: oldEstimatedTimeOfArrival - newEstimatedTimeOfArrival >= newRouteDuration * [min_time_difference_percentage].
MINUTES - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.FarePassValidityPeriodType
Pass is valid for a specified number of minutes.

NATURAL_AND_GEOGRAPHICAL_FOREST_HEALTH_OTHER_VEGETATION - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

onEventTextUpdated(EventText) - Method in interface com.here.sdk.navigation.EventTextListener
Called whenever there is a new text notification for a maneuver (multiple notifications can be given for the same maneuver at different distances (for example: "After 500 meters turn right." or "Now turn right.") and in that case, this method will be called once for each distance.
onFeaturesNotAvailable(List<LocationFeature>) - Method in interface com.here.sdk.location.LocationStatusListener

ONLINE_ROUTING - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.engine.PassThroughFeature

ONLINE_SEARCH - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.engine.PassThroughFeature

OptimizationMode - Enum Class in com.here.sdk.routing

OPTIMIZED_CLIENT_MAP - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.engine.CatalogType

Supports downloading of map data - in advance - into the cache to optimize temporary offline use cases that rely on cached map data.

Creates a PolygonPrefetcher instance for a given SDKNativeEngine.

The polyline passing through the middle of the corridor.

The polyline representing the traffic entity shape.
polylineProgress(List<ScalarKeyframe>, Easing, KeyframeInterpolationMode) - Static method in class com.here.sdk.animation.MapItemKeyFrameTrack
Creates a keyframe track used to animate the progress of a polyline.
PolylineSimplificationCallback - Interface in com.here.sdk.core
The method will be called on the main thread when PolylineSimplifier.simplify(java.util.List<com.here.sdk.core.GeoCoordinates>, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier.Options, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplificationCallback) is finished.
PolylineSimplificationError - Enum Class in com.here.sdk.core
Error code which specifies, what went wrong during PolylineSimplifier.simplify(java.util.List<com.here.sdk.core.GeoCoordinates>, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier.Options, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplificationCallback) operation.
PolylineSimplifier - Class in com.here.sdk.core
PolylineSimplifier helps to reduce the number of points in the polyline by removing redundant elements using Douglas–Peucker algorithm, so that result stays within PolylineSimplifier.Options.
PolylineSimplifier() - Constructor for class com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier
Creates a new instance of PolylineSimplifier.
PolylineSimplifier.Options - Class in com.here.sdk.core
Controls the strategy of PolylineSimplifier.simplify(java.util.List<com.here.sdk.core.GeoCoordinates>, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier.Options, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplificationCallback) when reducing a size of polyline.

POTENTIAL_TURN_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode

POTENTIAL_VEHICLE_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode

POTENTIAL_ZONE_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route incorporates roads within zones, which are potentially not accessible beyond the scheduled travel hours.

reset() - Method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapSceneLights
Resets all attributes of each light to their default values based on the current map scene settings.
resetPoiCategoriesVisibility() - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapContentSettings
Resets POI categories visibility to their default state.
resetTrafficIncidentFilter() - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapContentSettings
Removes all filters regarding Traffic Incidents so that all incidents will be displayed, when the display of Traffic Incidents is enabled using MapScene.enableFeatures(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) with MapFeatures.TRAFFIC_INCIDENTS.
resetTrafficRefreshPeriod() - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapContentSettings
Resets the traffic data (both flow and incidents) refresh period so the default traffic information validity time and the refresh period derived from the refresh period of the traffic server is used.
resetVehicleRestrictionFilter() - Static method in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapContentSettings
Removes all filters regarding vehicle restrictions so that all restrictions will be displayed, when the display of vehicle restrictions is enabled by enabling feature using MapScene.enableFeatures(java.util.Map<java.lang.String, java.lang.String>) with MapFeatures.VEHICLE_RESTRICTIONS and setting layer visibility using MapScene.setLayerVisibility(java.lang.String, com.here.sdk.mapview.VisibilityState).
RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.maploader.MapLoaderError
The requested resource is not found.

A place to eat.
RESTRICTED_ACCESS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.search.EVAccessType
Accessible only to a limited group, such as customers, taxis, or vehicles from specific brands.
restrictedIfAxleWeightLessThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle weight per axle is less than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfAxleWeightMoreThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle weight per axle is more than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfGrossWeightLessThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle gross weight is less than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfGrossWeightMoreThanInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle gross weight is more than the weight in kilograms.
restrictedIfHigherThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is higher than the height in centimeters.
restrictedIfLongerThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is longer than the length in centimeters.
restrictedIfLowerThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is lower than the height in centimeters.
restrictedIfNarrowerThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is narrower than the width in centimeters.
restrictedIfOccupantsFewerThan - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the occupants number is fewer than the value.
restrictedIfOccupantsMoreThan - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the occupants number is more than the value.
restrictedIfShorterThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is shorter than the length in centimeters.
restrictedIfWiderThanInCentimeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.traffic.TrafficIncident.VehicleRestriction
Vehicles of the matching category are restricted if the vehicle is wider than the width in centimeters.
restriction - Variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.VehicleRestrictionIconProperties
Vehicle restriction to generate icon for.
restriction - Variable in class com.here.sdk.transport.VehicleRestriction

RestrictionType - Enum Class in com.here.sdk.transport

ROUTING - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.engine.UsageStats.Feature
Represents network traffic statistics for online usage corresponding to the following layer configurations: LayerConfiguration.Feature.OFFLINE_ROUTING LayerConfiguration.Feature.OFFLINE_BUS_ROUTING Counted when data for the corresponding layer is requested by the application by performing one of the following actions: Pan the map view to areas that have not been cached, prefetched or installed before. Use MapDownloader to download and install a Region. Prefetch map data into the map cache with the RoutePrefetcher for areas that have not been cached, prefetched or installed before.

Shadows for all building types (extruded buildings and landmarks).
SHADOWS_ALL - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.mapview.MapFeatureModes

Instantiation attempt failed because the shared SDK engine is not instantiated.
SHARP_CURVE_LEFT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadSignType
A sign indicating a sharp curve to the left.
SHARP_CURVE_RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadSignType
A sign indicating a sharp curve to the right.
SHARP_LEFT_TURN - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction
Sharp left turn maneuver, such as "Turn sharply left".
SHARP_RIGHT_TURN - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ManeuverAction

SHN - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.core.CountryCode

SHOPPING - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Top level category for places where consumer goods are commonly sold, such as clothing stores, grocery stores, hardware stores and other types of shopping centers.
SHOPPING_BOOKSTORE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells books, magazines and other reading material.
SHOPPING_CLOTHING_AND_ACCESORIES - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells apparel items, garments or fashion accessories for men, women, and children.
SHOPPING_CONSUMER_GOODS - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells a variety of products targeted to consumers.
SHOPPING_CONVENIENCE_STORE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
An establishment that sells groceries, candy, toiletries, soft drinks, tobacco products, newspapers and other products.
SHOPPING_DEPARTMENT_STORE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells a wide variety of merchandise that is organized by product or service departments.
SHOPPING_DRUGSTORE_PHARMACY - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells medications, toiletry items and other retail cosmetics.
SHOPPING_ELECTRONICS - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells consumer electronics and electronic entertainment equipment.
SHOPPING_FOOD_AND_DRINK - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells specialty products of a particular type of food or beverage.
SHOPPING_HAIR_AND_BEAUTY - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that provides hair styling and personal appearance services.
SHOPPING_HARDWARE_HOUSE_GARDEN - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A business that sells crafts, gardening, remodeling, or decorating items for the home.
SHOPPING_MALL_COMPLEX - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A complex of businesses that are co-located and share common services.
SHORT_DASHED - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.navigation.DividerMarker
The lanes are divided by a short dashed line.
SHORTEST - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.OptimizationMode

sidePathIndexes - Variable in class com.here.sdk.electronichorizon.ElectronicHorizonSegment

SIGHTS_AND_MUSEUMS - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SIGHTS_LANDMARK_ATTACTION - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
Deprecated.

SIGHTS_LANDMARK_ATTRACTION - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
A designated area of special interest to tourists.
SIGHTS_MUSEUM - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory

SIGHTS_RELIGIOUS_PLACE - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.search.PlaceCategory
An establishment special religious significance or where religious services are held.

signValue - Variable in class com.here.sdk.navigation.RoadSignWarning

SIMPLE_POLYLINE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode

SIMPLIFICATION_IN_METERS_14_ZOOM_LEVEL - Static variable in class com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier.Options
Value for simplification tolerance for 14 zoom level without significant artifacts.
simplificationToleranceInMeters - Variable in class com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier.Options
Sets the accuracy limit for the PolylineSimplifier.simplify(java.util.List<com.here.sdk.core.GeoCoordinates>, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier.Options, com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplificationCallback): higher tolerance results in more simplification (fewer points); lower tolerance keeps the line closer to its original shape.
simplify(List<GeoCoordinates>, PolylineSimplifier.Options, PolylineSimplificationCallback) - Method in class com.here.sdk.core.PolylineSimplifier
Reduces the number of points in the input polyline.
SINGLE_SOLID_LINE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.navigation.DividerMarker
The lanes are divided by a single solid line.
singleAxleGroupInKilograms - Variable in class com.here.sdk.transport.WeightPerAxleGroup

TrafficFlow - Class in com.here.sdk.traffic
This class provides details about traffic flow along a GeoCorridor, inside a GeoCircle or a GeoBox, that represents particular path of the road network.
Backends for TrafficEngine and traffic vector tiles are different however backends may share the same data.
For additional information about fields, refer to Traffic API v7 API Reference: Traffic API v7.
TrafficFlowBase - Interface in com.here.sdk.traffic
This interface provides details about a traffic flow.
For additional information about fields, refer to Traffic API v7 API Reference: Traffic API v7.

VIGNETTE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.ZoneCategory
Vignette roads, which are found in some European countries.
VIOLATED_AVOID_CONTROLLED_ACCESS_HIGHWAY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_DIFFICULT_TURNS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid difficult turns.
VIOLATED_AVOID_DIRT_ROAD - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_FERRY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_PARK - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_RAIL_FERRY - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_SEASONAL_CLOSURE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid seasonal closure.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TOLL_ROAD - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TOLL_TRANSPONDER - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid toll booth that requires transponder.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TRUCK_ROAD_TYPE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid restricted truck road types.
VIOLATED_AVOID_TUNNEL - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_AVOID_U_TURNS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid u turns.
VIOLATED_BLOCKED_ROAD - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route uses roads blocked by traffic events or route did not manage to avoid the requested avoidBoundingBoxAreas or countries or segments.
VIOLATED_CARPOOL - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route did not manage to avoid user preference.
VIOLATED_CHARGING_STATION_OPENING_HOURS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Charging at the charging station planned at the destination of this section falls outside of opening hours.
VIOLATED_CRITICAL_RULE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route has violoated a non-detailed critical rule.
VIOLATED_EMERGENCY_GATE - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route goes through an emergency gate.
VIOLATED_MIN_CHARGE_AT_CS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
The route can not reach all charging stations on the route with the minimum required charge, as the initial charge was to low.
VIOLATED_MIN_CHARGE_AT_DESTINATION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
The route can not reach the waypoint, as the there are not enough charging stops available or the initial charge was to low.
VIOLATED_MIN_CHARGE_AT_FIRST_CS - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
The route can not reach the first charging station with the minimum required charge, as the initial charge was to low.
VIOLATED_START_DIRECTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Start direction of the route is not as requested.
VIOLATED_TRANSPORT_MODE_IN_ROUTE_HANDLE_DECODING - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.RoutingError
Route handle decoding failed due to forbidden segments for the specified transport mode.
VIOLATED_TURN_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route uses a time-restricted turn.
VIOLATED_VEHICLE_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
Route uses a road which is forbidden for the given vehicle profile.
VIOLATED_ZONE_RESTRICTION - Enum constant in enum class com.here.sdk.routing.SectionNoticeCode
